name: Southwestern Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 scallions, white and green parts, chopped
16 (about 2 lb) new potatoes, cooked, drained see note
recipeInstructions:
1. With a spatula, combine the mayonnaise and mustard with all remaining ingredients except the potatoes.
2. Mix well until all seasonings are incorporated.
3. Pour the dressing over the warm potatoes and toss gently to coat evenly.
Yield: 6 servings
